questions.title: Halve the harbor tariff
questions.description: The trading houses petition to halve the tariff on foreign hulls for a year. The treasury would lean on the chora's farmers instead.

questions.title: Fund the Founders' Rites in marble
questions.description: Rebuild the shrine of Protis in marble and expand the founders' procession — a public statement that the old ways still rule Massalia.

questions.title: Open the muster rolls to metics
questions.description: Let resident foreigners serve in the city levy in exchange for limited market rights. More shields on the wall — and more strangers behind it.

questions.title: Raise a public grain reserve
questions.description: Tax this year's surplus into a civic granary against a bad harvest. Prudence to some; a seizure of honest profit to others.
